close_reason: Fixed in commit 28e4703 (add Debug impls across all backend structs)
description:
src/lib.rs line 34:

    pub struct AwsSsmBackend {
        client: aws_sdk_ssm::Client,
        path: String,
    }

…has no `Debug` impl. `aws_sdk_ssm::Client` itself derives Debug (verified in aws-sdk-ssm 1.109.0 src/client.rs), so `#[derive(Debug)]` will compile cleanly.

Public API rule of thumb (rust-api-guidelines C-DEBUG): every public type should implement Debug unless there's a specific reason not to. None applies here — the struct holds only an SDK client and a String path, neither of which is sensitive (the SSM parameter name is not a secret).

Identical to 8bh8.8 for secretx-aws-sm. Apply the same fix in both crates for consistency.
title: secretx-aws-ssm: AwsSsmBackend missing #[derive(Debug)]
